prompt: Resolve the field tradeoff: distinguish common shortcuts from acceptable journeyman practice.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: protecting downstream vs. single-location wiring. The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 210.12.
title: Judgment call: GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting (residential job)
